scenes.title: The Restaurant Kitchen
scenes.background_prompt: A busy restaurant kitchen with stainless steel counters, a gas range, hanging pots, a pass-through window, and bright overhead lights. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A busy restaurant kitchen with bright overhead fluorescent lights. A chef in a white double-breasted coat and a tall white toque stands at a gas range, holding a skillet with one hand and flipping a golden pancake into the air — the pancake hovers mid-flip above the pan, perfectly round. His other hand is poised to catch the pan's handle. A waitress in a black apron over a white shirt passes behind him carrying two plates of food, one in each hand, heading toward the pass-through window. Stainless steel counters line the walls, and copper pots hang from an overhead rack. A ticket rail above the pass-through window holds several paper order slips.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place chef at the gas range, standing and holding a skillet with one hand, flipping a golden pancake mid-air above the pan. Place waitress passing behind him, carrying two plates of food toward the pass-through window.
